content.full_text:
CITY OF REDONDO BEACH
CALIFORNIA
415 DIAMOND STREET
PO BOX 770
REDONDO BEACH, CA 90277-0770

CITY OF REDONDO BEACH
NOTICE OF A PUBLIC HEARING BEFORE THE MAYOR AND CITY COUNCIL TO CONSIDER THE REQUEST FOR A PLANNED DEVELOPMENT AND AN ADMINISTRATIVE APPEAL OF A VARIANCE (1800 - 1804 ARTESIA BOULEVARD)

NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN, that the Mayor and City Council of the City of Redondo Beach, California, pursuant to law, will hold a public hearing on Tuesday, April 16, 1991, at 6:30 P.M., or as soon thereafter as possible, in the Council Chambers of City Hall, 415 Diamond Street, Redondo Beach, California, to consider a request for a Planned Development and an administrative appeal to the Planning Commission's approval of a Variance to allow construction of a two-story commercial center and a one-story drive-through restaurant, with less than code-required parking spaces in the Planned Development Commercial (PDC) Land Use District at 1800-1804 Artesia Boulevard.

The Planning Commission recommended approval of these requests as set forth in Planning Commission Resolution No. 7868.

ANY AND ALL PERSONS interested in the Variance and the Planned Development may appear and be heard thereon. If you challenge the Variance and the Planned Development in court, you may be limited to raising only those issues you or someone else raised at the public hearing described in this notice or in written correspondence delivered to the Mayor and City Council at or prior to this public hearing.

If you require further information about this matter, you may contact Carolyne Bihn, Senior Planner, 318-0637.

John L. Oliver, City Clerk

sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document is a city public hearing notice, not an FPPC advice letter. Document ID UNK-91-10472 appears to be misclassified - contains no legal question or FPPC response regarding political practices or campaign finance regulations. No question or conclusion sections present.
